Core Question to Employee: "What am I about to do and how long will it take?"
Purpose: Set expectations, reduce anxiety, explain what's coming
What Gets Decided:
None - Informational only
• Set expectations
• Explain what employer has provided
• Prime for decisions ahead
Triggers/Logic:
Always shown as first screen
Trigger: enrollment_start event
UI Pattern/Components: Welcome Card, Progress Stepper (horizontal), Process Overview, Time Estimate Badge
Content Framework Data:
Headline: "Let's set up your health coverage"
Subtext by construct: V="Review your benefits" / M="Choose your tier" / F="Build your coverage"
Time estimate: "~X minutes"
Step count: "Y steps ahead"
FLEX Notes:
Most steps: 6-7
"Build and confirm"
Show wallet balance

Purpose: Show what employer provides, build trust and understanding
What Gets Decided:
None - View only
(Acknowledge coverage)
• View base policy details
• Understand Sum Insured
• See covered members (self/family)
• Acknowledge coverage"
Triggers/Logic:
Always shown
Trigger: After L0 continue
Data: base_plan_config
UI Pattern/Components: Coverage Card (view-only), SI Display, Family Covered List, Key Benefits Grid, Wallet Display (Flex only)
Content Framework Data:
Headline: V/M="Your coverage from [Company]" / F="Your benefits wallet"
SI display: "₹X lakh coverage"
Family display: "Covers: You + Spouse + Children"
Benefits: Top 4-5 benefits with icons
FLEX Notes:
Show wallet amount
"₹X to build coverage"
Wallet meter visual

Core Question to Employee: "Who is covered and are the details correct?"
What Gets Decided:
Member details confirmation
Optional: Add new members
• Add/confirm spouse
• Add/confirm children
• Decision: Include parents?
• Decision: Include in-laws?"
Triggers/Logic:
If family_edit_allowed = true
OR member_details_required = true
Data: existing_members[], allowed_relationships[]
UI Pattern/Components: Member Card (compact), Member Form (modal/bottom-sheet), Relationship Dropdown, DOB Picker, Validation Messages
Content Framework Data:
Headline: "Your covered family members"
Subtext: "Review and update if needed"
Add CTA: "+ Add family member"
Validation: "DOB is required", "Select relationship"
MODULAR Notes:
May expand with tier change
Note tier-specific family rules
FLEX Notes:
Dynamic based on plan choice
"Changes based on your selections"

Core Question to Employee: "What level of coverage do I want?"
Purpose: Allow user to choose/upgrade base plan configuration
What Gets Decided:
Plan tier selection (M)
SI selection (F)
Family definition (F)
Cover variants (F)
• Understand coverage gap
• Decision: Buy Top-Up?
• Select Top-Up amount
• See premium impact"
Triggers/Logic:
If constructType = modular OR flex
Skip for vanilla
Data: available_plans[], current_selection
UI Pattern/Components: Plan Comparison Cards, Tier Selector (radio group), SI Dropdown, Family Definition Picker, Cover Variant Toggles, Premium Impact Display
Content Framework Data:
M Headline: "Upgrade your coverage"
M Comparison: Tier benefit table
F Headline: "Configure your coverage"
F Config: SI + Family dropdowns
Premium: "+₹X/month for upgrade"
MODULAR Notes:
Tier comparison cards
Price delta display
"Upgrade for ₹X more"
FLEX Notes:
Full configuration UI
SI + Family + Variants
Wallet impact display

Layer Name: Enhancement Options / Secondary Coverage + Add Ons
What Gets Decided:
Top-up selection
Secondary plan selection
Add-on selection (multi)
• Understand why separate policy
• Add parent details
• Decision: Top-Up on Secondary?
• See premium for parents"

"• View available add-ons
• Decision: Select Maternity?
• Decision: Select OPD?
• Decision: Select Dental/Vision?
• Decision: Select Wellness?"
Triggers/Logic:
If any optional component exists:
topUp.available = true OR
secondary.available = true OR
addOns.available = true
UI Pattern/Components: Top-up Card, Secondary Plan Card, Add-on Toggle Cards, Plan Comparison Modal, Premium Calculator (inline)
Content Framework Data:
Headline: "Enhance your coverage"
Subtext: V="Add more protection" / F="Use your wallet"
Section headers: "Top-ups", "Family plans", "Add-ons"
Each card: Name + Benefit + Price + CTA
MODULAR Notes:
Modular top-ups as tier cards
Secondary if available
FLEX Notes:
Wallet-aware pricing
"₹X from wallet"
Remaining balance display

Core Question to Employee: "How much will I pay and how?"
Purpose: Show total cost, payment breakdown, get commitment
What Gets Decided:
Confirm payment amount
Acknowledge deduction method

"• Full coverage summary
• Total premium breakdown
• Employer vs Employee split
• Payment confirmation
• E-card download"
Triggers/Logic:
If any employee_payment_required:
employee_payable > 0
Skip if all employer-paid
UI Pattern/Components: Premium Breakdown Card, Employer/Employee Split Visual, Payment Method Info, Salary Deduction Details, Consent for Payment
Content Framework Data:
Headline: "Your investment"
Breakdown: "Base: ₹X, Top-up: ₹Y, Add-ons: ₹Z"
Split: "[Company] pays: ₹A | You pay: ₹B"
Deduction: "₹B/month from salary"
VANILLA Notes:
Simple total if any
Often skipped
FLEX Notes:
Wallet + overflow
"Wallet: ₹W | You pay: ₹P"
Clear if within wallet

Core Question to Employee: "Is everything correct? Do I agree to proceed?"
What Gets Decided:
Confirm all selections
Provide legal consent
Submit enrollment
Triggers/Logic:
Always shown as final screen
Trigger: All previous layers complete
Data: all_selections, consent_required[]
UI Pattern/Components: Review Summary Card (expandable sections), Dependent List, Selection List, Consent Checkboxes, Submit CTA (primary), Edit Links
Content Framework Data:
Headline: "Review and confirm"
Sections: "Your coverage", "Family members", "Your investment"
Consent: "[checkbox] I agree to terms..."
CTA: "Confirm enrollment"
Edit: "Edit" link per section
FLEX Notes:
Include all configurations
Wallet usage summary
Overflow consent if needed
